I’ll inspect fallback/model normalization and tests next.

content.text:
Implemented the custom provider model forwarding fix.

What changed:
- Updated `packages/backend/src/routing/proxy/provider-client.ts`
- For `endpointKey === 'custom'`, Manifest now strips only the synthesized internal prefix matching:
  - `custom:<provider-id>/...`
- It preserves raw upstream model IDs that legitimately contain slashes, e.g.:
  - `accounts/fireworks/routers/kimi-k2p5-turbo`

Validation:
- Added temporary focused regression coverage in `provider-client.spec.ts`
- Confirmed the test fails would have caught the issue and passes with the fix:
  - `npm test --workspace=packages/backend -- provider-client.spec.ts`
- Removed the temporary regression test changes afterward per instruction.

Notes:
- No commit was created.
- Remaining modified files shown by git:
  - `packages/backend/src/routing/proxy/provider-client.ts` — intended fix
  - `package-lock.json` — pre-existing/side-effect version diff, not touched by the fix
  - `reports/` — untracked existing reports directory after test run
